description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of peep toe sandals from enroute. Pair it with any kind of western and ethnic wear, and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.Heel: 2"UpperLeather upper with a leather boe on the toe boxLeather footbed for all day comfortOutsoleDurable TPU outsole with grooved on the forefoot and has a grooved rubber heel patch for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
